intent: Write a 3-source deep brief on 'first-apartment kitchen build for under $250'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and grocery-gourmet-food categories and collect at least 5 products (knife, pan, cookware, storage, pantry staple). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/personalfinance for posts on minimum-viable kitchens, single-pan-meals, or first-apartment regrets. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Kitchen utensil' and 'Cookware and bakeware' articles and extract 3-4 facts about essential categories. The report must: (a) propose a $250 kit from storefront with running totals, (b) back each category choice with Wikipedia's functional framing, (c) integrate community 'skip this' warnings, (d) close with a week-one cook-from-scratch dinner plan. Cite every claim.
